vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive, artistic. An award-winning creative agency aesthetic.

hero_split.description: Asymmetrical 60/40 or 50/50 split. Left side typography and CTA. Right side is the main photographer generated image, overlaid with smaller floating gallery images that have parallax or subtle float animations.

bento_grid.description: Use a Tetris-style asymmetrical bento grid for the Featured Work and Gallery. Mix tall (col-span-1 row-span-2), wide (col-span-2 row-span-1), and large (col-span-2 row-span-2) items.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-amber-400 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

cards.style: bg-neutral-900/50 border border-white/5 rounded-none p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-neutral-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 py-4

interactions_and_motion.hover_effects: Images should have a subtle scale up (scale-105) on hover. High-end sites use slow transitions (duration-700 ease-out).
interactions_and_motion.scroll_animations: Elements should fade in and slide up slightly on scroll. Use Framer Motion if possible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON and implement the design system strictly.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Clash Display or Bebas Neue.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
For the hero section, place the main photographer image prominently, and overlay 2-3 smaller images from the gallery arrays to create a 'floating gallery' effect as requested.
Use raw Tailwind and HTML for the creative bento grids (Featured Work, Gallery), and Shadcn UI for structured components like the Booking Modal, FAQ Accordion, and Contact Form.
Apply a subtle noise/grain texture over the background to achieve the 'cinematic' feel.
Ensure the hero section does NOT look like a standard SaaS template. It needs to be bold, asymmetric, and heavily emphasize the visuals.
